mapper.select: SELECT id, table_pk, app_token, table_id, record_id, fields_json, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, del_flag FROM bitable_record WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0'

SELECT id, table_pk, app_token, table_id, record_id, fields_json, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, del_flag FROM bitable_record WHERE app_token = #{appToken} AND table_id = #{tableId} AND record_id = #{recordId} AND del_flag = '0'

SELECT id, table_pk, app_token, table_id, record_id, fields_json, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, del_flag FROM bitable_record WHERE app_token = #{appToken} AND table_id = #{tableId} AND del_flag = '0'
AND fields_json LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND DATE(created_time) >= #{startDate}
AND DATE(created_time) <= #{endDate}
AND IF(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, '$.create_time') REGEXP '^[0-9]{10,13}$', FROM_UNIXTIME(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, '$.create_time') / 1000), DATE(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, '$.create_time')))) > DATE(#{cond.value})
AND IF(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, '$.create_time') REGEXP '^[0-9]{10,13}$', FROM_UNIXTIME(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, '$.create_time') / 1000), DATE(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, '$.create_time')))) < DATE(#{cond.value})
AND (JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, '$.create_time') IS NULL OR JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, '$.create_time') = '')
AND JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, '$.create_time') IS NOT NULL AND JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, '$.create_time') != ''
AND IF(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, '$.create_time') REGEXP '^[0-9]{10,13}$', FROM_UNIXTIME(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, '$.create_time') / 1000), DATE(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, '$.create_time')))) = DATE(#{cond.value})
AND fields_json LIKE CONCAT('%', #{cond.field}, '%', #{cond.value}, '%')
AND (fields_json NOT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{cond.field}, '%', #{cond.value}, '%') OR fields_json IS NULL)
AND IF(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field})) REGEXP '^[0-9]{10,13}$', FROM_UNIXTIME(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field})) / 1000), DATE(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field}))))) = DATE(#{cond.value})
AND JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field})) = #{cond.value}
AND IF(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field})) REGEXP '^[0-9]{10,13}$', FROM_UNIXTIME(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field})) / 1000), DATE(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field}))))) != DATE(#{cond.value})
AND (JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field})) != #{cond.value} OR JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field})) IS NULL)
AND IF(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field})) REGEXP '^[0-9]{10,13}$', FROM_UNIXTIME(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field})) / 1000), DATE(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field}))))) > DATE(#{cond.value})
AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field}))) + 0 > #{cond.value} + 0
AND IF(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field})) REGEXP '^[0-9]{10,13}$', FROM_UNIXTIME(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field})) / 1000), DATE(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field}))))) < DATE(#{cond.value})
AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field}))) + 0 < #{cond.value} + 0
AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field}))) LIKE CONCAT(#{cond.value}, '%')
AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field}))) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{cond.value})
AND (JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field})) IS NULL OR JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field})) = '' OR JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field})) = 'null')
AND JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field})) IS NOT NULL AND JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field})) != '' AND JSON_EXTRACT(fields_json, CONCAT('$.', #{cond.field})) != 'null'
ORDER BY created_time ${sortOrder}
ORDER BY id DESC
ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bitable_record WHERE app_token = #{appToken} AND table_id = #{tableId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bitable_record (table_pk, app_token, table_id, record_id, fields_json, created_by, created_time, del_flag) VALUES (#{tablePk}, #{appToken}, #{tableId}, #{recordId}, #{fieldsJson}, #{createdBy}, #{createdTime}, '0')

INSERT INTO bitable_record (table_pk, app_token, table_id, record_id, fields_json, created_by, created_time, del_flag) VALUES
(#{item.tablePk}, #{item.appToken}, #{item.tableId}, #{item.recordId}, #{item.fieldsJson}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.createdTime}, '0')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM bitable_record WHERE app_token = #{appToken} AND table_id = #{tableId} AND record_id = #{recordId}
DELETE FROM bitable_record WHERE app_token = #{appToken} AND table_id = #{tableId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, table_pk, app_token, table_id, record_id, fields_json, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, del_flag FROM bitable_record WHERE app_token = #{appToken} AND table_id = #{tableId} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY id DESC
